Attended opening reception Frida Kahlo and Diego Rivera exhibition Philadelphia Museum of Art today.
Frida born July 6, 1907 in Coyoacán, Mexico City; mother Matilde Calderón, father Wilhelm Kahlo photographer.
Frida contracted polio age 6; right leg shorter and weaker; influenced her art depicting physical suffering.
September 17 1925: bus accident age 18; spinal fractures, pelvis/leg breaks, internal injuries, damaged uterus.
Had 30+ surgeries including spinal fusion; chronic pain caused painkiller addiction throughout life.
Frida used small portable canvases, oil/watercolor/gouache paints; layering techniques with collage elements.
